patch.value: Export PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_VERSION constant and bind all assertion sites
Schema version '4.0.1' is a string literal in cli-contracts.ts plus two spec files; a bump needs 3 coordinated edits with no compile guard. A named export removes drift risk.
Constant exported and imported by both spec files; grep for bare '4.0.1' outside the definition returns zero; CI passes.
Schema version '4.0.1' is a string literal in cli-contracts.ts plus two spec files; a bump needs 3 coordinated edits with no compile guard. A named export removes drift risk.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implemented (orchestrator, part of pm-at83 bundle). Hoisted the duplicated schema-version literals in src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts into three exported constants: PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_VERSION='4.0.2' (strict action-scoped schema), PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_MAJOR (derived major that now drives the $id 'tool-parameters-v{major}' slug so version + $id never drift), and PM_PROVIDER_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_VERSION='1.0.0' (provider-flat schema). PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA's x-schema-version + $id now reference the constants; PM_PROVIDER_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA likewise. Re-exported automatically via src/sdk/index.ts (`export * from ./cli-contracts.js`). Bound the two assertion sites to the constants: tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts (schema_version + schema_id) and tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts (schema_version). No remaining hardcoded '4.0.2' in src/ or tests/. Full build+test pending in orchestrator integration phase.

patch.value: Shipped in pm-at83. Hoisted the duplicated '4.0.2'/'1.0.0' schema-version literals in src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts into exported constants PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_VERSION, PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_MAJOR (derives the $id 'tool-parameters-v{major}' slug so version+$id never drift), and PM_PROVIDER_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA_VERSION; bound both spec assertion sites (contracts-command.spec schema_version+schema_id, sdk-index.spec schema_version) to the constants. No bare '4.0.2' remains in src/ or tests/. Re-exported automatically via src/sdk/index.ts. Verified: manual `pm contracts` returns schema_version=4.0.2 + tool-parameters-v4 schema_id; full suite + 100% coverage green.
